name: openrouter-olmo-chat-skill
description: Send chat completion requests to AllenAI Olmo via OpenRouter
snippet:
import os
from openai import OpenAI

# Initialize the client with your key and the OpenRouter base URL
client = OpenAI(
    base_url="https://openrouter.ai/api/v1",
    api_key=os.environ.get("OPENROUTER_API_KEY"),
)

print("Sending request to Olmo model via OpenRouter...")

# Send a request to the Olmo chat model with basic error handling
try:
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model="allenai/olmo-3-32b-think",
        messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "What are 5 things to do in Seattle?"}],
    )
    print("\n--- Model Response ---")
    print(response.choices[0].message.content)
except Exception as e:
    print("Request failed:", e)
usage:
1) pip install openai
2) export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=...
3) python example.py
author: Copilot
